title: Pork Stir Fry with Silky Sauce
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish made with pork, vegetables, and a silky sauce, all cooked to perfection in a wok or large skillet.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Add the vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the Dutch spice and silky sauce, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with sesame seeds, if desired.
